global.title: GM suspends next-gen electric truck indefinitely as it retreats to gas
global.summary: General Motors has indefinitely suspended plans to refresh its full-size electric truck and SUV lineup, putting the future of the Chevrolet Silverado EV, GMC Sierra EV, Hummer EV, and Cadillac Escalade IQ in limbo beyond the current generation. The move marks yet another retreat from GM’s once-ambit

global.title: Tesla lithium refinery discharge contains toxic metals, drainage district demands halt
global.summary: Independent lab testing has found traces of hexavalent chromium — a known carcinogen — along with arsenic and elevated levels of lithium in wastewater discharged from Tesla’s nearly $1 billion lithium refinery in Robstown, Texas. The Nueces County Drainage District No. 2, which manages the ditch rec

global.title: US wind just had a big comeback – and 2026 could be even bigger
global.summary: The US wind industry bounced back in a big way in 2025, installing 8.2 gigawatts (GW) of new capacity – up 49% from the year before – according to Wood Mackenzie’s latest US Wind Energy Monitor report. more…

global.title: Tesla’s California sales crash 24% as state’s EV market plunges to lowest since 2021
global.summary: Tesla’s registrations in California crashed 24.3% in the first quarter of 2026, with the automaker selling over 10,000 fewer vehicles in the state compared to the same period last year. The data comes from the California New Car Dealers Association’s (CNCDA) Q1 2026 Auto Outlook report, which also r

global.title: Kia cuts EV4 prices by $10,000 in response to the new Volkswagen ID.3 Neo
global.summary: The battle of the entry-level EVs is heating up. A week after Volkswagen launched the upgraded ID.3 Neo, Kia is cutting EV4 prices by over $10,000 in some markets. more…

global.title: Toyota’s 3-row electric SUV is gaining a luxury Lexus sibling: Here’s our first look
global.summary: Toyota’s Lexus brand was caught testing a three-row electric SUV for the first time, expected to arrive as a higher-end sibling to the Highlander EV. more…

global.title: Self-propelled Worx mower $360, Greenworks Pro pressure washer $350, $500 off Jackery 1,536Wh power station, more
global.summary: Today’s 9to5Toys Green Deals is headlined by a nice markdown on a cordless self-propelled Worx lawn mower, the Greenworks’ Pro 2,700 PSI electric pressure washer at $50 off, and a return price drop on Jackery’s 1,536Wh v2 portable power station thanks to an exclusive promo code. global.title: Volkswagen turns the Jetta into an affordable electric SUV for China [Images]
global.summary: Starting at under $25,000, the Jetta is one of Volkswagen’s most affordable vehicles. Now, the company is turning into an all-electric SUV for China. more…

global.title: Hyundai and Kia will extend warranties for cars with ICCU issues
global.summary: Hyundai Motor Group has announced that it will extend warranties for cars that suffer from a rare issue which has nevertheless plagued some owners, potentially causing cars to lose power. more…

global.title: Jeep shelves its only EV in the US for 2026, but promises it will return better than ever
global.summary: Jeep’s only electric SUV in the US, the Wagoneer S, will not receive a 2026 model year. The company said it will return with major improvements. more…
